history.content:
<thought>
The cells directly ahead are unknown, but the visible right side has a clear safe floor path and the left side is blocked by a wall. I should turn right to face along the open corridor rather than moving forward into uncertainty.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The open path is to my left, so I should turn left to face that safe direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cells directly ahead are unknown from this view, but the immediate forward path in my current direction appears clear from the bottom row. Since I need to keep progressing through the open corridor and there is no safer indicated turn that improves access to the goal, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
